sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni su postali veoma važni u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become very important in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُهَا النَّاسُ لِلِاتِّصَالِ وَإِرْسَالِ الرَّسَائِلِ وَتَصَفُّحِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi ih koriste za pozive, slanje poruka i pretraživanje interneta.
sentences.translationEn: People use them for calling, sending messages, and surfing the internet.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَسْتَعْمِلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْأَشْخَاصِ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ التَّعْلِيمِيَّةَ لِتَعَلُّمِ لُغَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, mnogi ljudi koriste obrazovne aplikacije za učenje novih jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Many people also use educational applications to learn new languages.
